0x0000000BfBf4C62c43c2E71Ef0093f382BF7A7.name: Supercexy
0x0000000BfBf4C62c43c2E71Ef0093f382BF7A7.description: Supercexy is a self-custodial trading front end for Hyperliquid spot and perpetual futures, positioning itself as an on-chain CEX-style experience. It offers charts, order book, balances and positions, and advanced order types such as TWAP and iceberg, aimed at traders who want familiar exchange workflows while interacting with Hyperliquid on-chain.

0x0cbf655B0D22Ae71FBa3a674b0E1c0C7E7f975.name: PVP.trade
0x0cbf655B0D22Ae71FBa3a674b0E1c0C7E7f975.description: PVP.trade is a Telegram bot for trading Hyperliquid perpetuals in group chats: members can long or short perps, share alpha, copy or countertrade each other, and use commands for charts, leaderboards, stops, and wallet tracking. Custody uses Turnkey with optional passkey 2FA; funding is USDC on Hyperliquid, Arbitrum, or Solana with bridging after minimum deposits.

0x12EE177DB3cEafedc639D023A29CC8588DB3A4.name: Sushi
0x12EE177DB3cEafedc639D023A29CC8588DB3A4.description: Sushi is a decentralized exchange and automated market maker for swapping tokens, providing liquidity, and earning yield across many blockchain networks. It offers on-chain trading, pools, and cross-chain products such as SushiXSwap for users who prefer non-custodial DeFi.

0x1924b8561eeF20e70Ede628A296175D358BE80.name: Based
0x1924b8561eeF20e70Ede628A296175D358BE80.description: Based is a self-custodial trading and spending app for Hyperliquid markets and everyday payments: trade spot and perps in a web and mobile experience, and spend from crypto balances with a Visa card where supported. It targets active traders and on-chain users who want unified trading, wallet custody, and card spending in one place.

0x1cC34f6AF34653c515B47A83e1De70ba9B0CdA.name: Axiom
0x1cC34f6AF34653c515B47A83e1De70ba9B0CdA.description: Axiom is a non-custodial web trading terminal for Solana and DeFi: spot and memecoin flows, wallet and X (Twitter) tracking, limit orders, and integrations such as Hyperliquid perpetuals and yield partners. It targets active on-chain traders who want execution, discovery, and position monitoring in one interface rather than juggling multiple apps.

0x2868fC0d9786A740b491577A43502259eFA78a.name: Insilico Terminal
0x2868fC0d9786A740b491577A43502259eFA78a.description: Insilico Terminal is a web-based professional trading terminal for order, position, and execution management across major CEX and DEX venues, including Hyperliquid perps and spot. It combines a visual interface with a command-line style workflow and advanced institutional-style order types, and is free to use with API keys kept in the browser per its security model.

0x42F3226007290b02C5a0B15bccbB1bA6dF04F9.name: Markets by Kinetiq
0x42F3226007290b02C5a0B15bccbB1bA6dF04F9.description: Markets by Kinetiq is a Hyperliquid trading terminal for builder-deployed perpetuals such as US500 and other equities, indices, currencies, and commodities, with order book, positions, and standard perp tooling. It is aimed at traders who want 24/7 access to these markets through the official markets.xyz app.

0x4950994884602D1B6c6D96e4Fe30F58205C393.name: Dreamcash
0x4950994884602D1B6c6D96e4Fe30F58205C393.description: Dreamcash is a self-custodial trading app that connects to Hyperliquid, offering mobile, web, and desktop clients for perpetuals, spot, and HIP-3 markets—including real-world asset pairs—with AI alerts and rewards. It is published by Supreme Liquid Labs and positions itself as a CEX-style experience with on-chain settlement; the app is not affiliated with or endorsed by Hyperliquid.

0x4c8731897503f86a2643959CBaA1E075E84BAB.name: Bullpen
0x4c8731897503f86a2643959CBaA1E075E84BAB.description: Bullpen is a non-custodial trading terminal for onchain markets. It lets users trade perps via Hyperliquid, spot tokens via Jupiter Ultra (and Hyperliquid spot for listed assets), and prediction markets via Polymarket from one interface.

0x4eC89C1C70cA1e2F224bB43e28d122F4d2B4E8.name: Markets by Kinetiq
0x4eC89C1C70cA1e2F224bB43e28d122F4d2B4E8.description: Markets by Kinetiq is a Hyperliquid trading terminal for builder-deployed perpetuals such as US500 and other equities, indices, currencies, and commodities, with order book, positions, and standard perp tooling. It is aimed at traders who want 24/7 access to these markets through the official markets.xyz app. This is the builder code for their frontend, which is different to their HIP3 Builder code

0x5A3Bc60b0A99A7F4fBf0d15554FA5fE88e7628.name: Minara
0x5A3Bc60b0A99A7F4fBf0d15554FA5fE88e7628.description: Minara is an AI-native financial assistant with a built-in custodial wallet: research and chat across crypto, stocks, DeFi, and more, plus spot and perpetual trading with execution routed through Hyperliquid for perps (including Trading Copilot at copilot.minara.ai and AI autopilot strategies). It is aimed at traders and investors who want conversational analysis, agents, and one place to move between insight and execution.

0x60dC8E3dAd2e4E0738e813B9cB09b9c00B5e0F.name: Rainbow
0x60dC8E3dAd2e4E0738e813B9cB09b9c00B5e0F.description: Rainbow is a self-custodial Ethereum and EVM wallet with mobile apps and a browser extension for managing tokens, NFTs, swaps, bridges, and hardware wallets (Ledger and Trezor). It is aimed at everyday on-chain users and traders who want a single interface across many networks, including those used with Hyperliquid via WalletConnect and standard EVM workflows.

0x6D4E7F472e6A491B98CBEeD327417e310Ae8ce.name: Liquid
0x6D4E7F472e6A491B98CBEeD327417e310Ae8ce.description: Liquid is a non-custodial trading app (iOS, web, and more) that routes activity through Hyperliquid, offering hundreds of markets across crypto, FX, equities, and commodities with configurable leverage and a simplified long/short flow. It targets retail traders who want a mobile-first experience with low-friction access and self-custody; the app is published by HyperSports, Inc. and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Hyperliquid.

0x75982Eb8B734b24b653B39e308489A428041F1.name: WunderTrading
0x75982Eb8B734b24b653B39e308489A428041F1.description: WunderTrading is a cloud-based crypto automation platform for running trading bots (including TradingView signal bots, DCA, grid, and AI bots), copy trading, spread and arbitrage tools, and portfolio tracking across many exchanges. It supports Hyperliquid among its integrations and also offers an API and MCP for developers wiring external apps to execution.

0x7975CAFdFf839Ed5047244Ed3A0Dd82a898660.name: Dexari
0x7975CAFdFf839Ed5047244Ed3A0Dd82a898660.description: Dexari is a self-custodial mobile app for trading Hyperliquid perpetuals and spot with leverage (up to 40x), TradingView charts, and advanced order types, with card and bank funding and multi-factor secured custody. It targets traders who want a CEX-style workflow while keeping keys and balances on-chain.

0x999a4B5F268A8fBf33736FeFf360d462AD248D.name: tread.fi
0x999a4B5F268A8fBf33736FeFf360d462AD248D.description: tread.fi is an order execution management system (OEMS) and algorithmic trading terminal that connects to your existing CEX and DEX accounts so you can run execution algorithms, multi-leg orders, and real-time tracking from one interface. It supports Hyperliquid and other venues, optional REST API integration, and vCeFi for verifiable on-chain proofs of CeFi activity.

0x9b12E858dA780a96876E3018780CF0D83359b0.name: OneKey
0x9b12E858dA780a96876E3018780CF0D83359b0.description: OneKey is an open-source, multi-chain crypto wallet with mobile, desktop, browser extension, and web app clients, plus optional OneKey hardware wallets for cold storage. It supports buying and selling, swaps, staking, MEV-aware trading flows, and dApp connectivity for users who want self-custody across many networks.

0x9f83fE01f4A62d44e8cA471e2eeB42B5C05531.name: Tria
0x9f83fE01f4A62d44e8cA471e2eeB42B5C05531.description: Tria is a self-custodial wallet and consumer interface for trading, earning, spending, and moving crypto across chains without manual bridging or gas management. It also provides developer SDKs for shared wallets, SSO onboarding, and cross-chain execution.

0xA47D4d99191db54A4829cdf3de2417E527c3b0.name: Pear Protocol
0xA47D4d99191db54A4829cdf3de2417E527c3b0.description: Pear Protocol is a decentralized pair and basket trading layer: open leveraged long/short positions across multiple tokens in one trade, with execution on venues such as Hyperliquid and integrations like SYMM. It targets traders who want relative-value and narrative-driven strategies with cross-margined legs, charts, TWAP, and optional AI signal tooling (Agent Pear).

0xA9AB442F9dFE752Dc74b666c41E7a0498BaF86.name: MetaScalp
0xA9AB442F9dFE752Dc74b666c41E7a0498BaF86.description: MetaScalp is a Windows desktop crypto trading terminal aimed at active and professional traders, with order book, tape, clusters, and linked layouts across many exchanges. It integrates Hyperliquid spot and perpetuals alongside other venues and is distributed as an alpha-stage PC client with documentation on docs.metascalp.io.

0xAd9bE64fD7a35d99a138b87CB212BAefbCDCf0.name: Rabby Wallet
0xAd9bE64fD7a35d99a138b87CB212BAefbCDCf0.description: Rabby Wallet is an open-source browser extension and companion mobile and desktop apps for Ethereum and EVM chains, focused on clearer transaction previews, multi-chain UX, and security-oriented workflows for DeFi users. It can be used like other EVM wallets to connect to dapps and trading interfaces, including those compatible with Hyperliquid when accessed through supported Web3 connections.

0xB84168Cf3be63c6b8dad05FF5d755E97432fF8.name: Phantom
0xB84168Cf3be63c6b8dad05FF5d755E97432fF8.description: Phantom is a wallet that allows you to store and transfer your assets.

0xCf56dd84eD85EB4929e0A76A0f2F04049b4FfC.name: Infinex
0xCf56dd84eD85EB4929e0A76A0f2F04049b4FfC.description: Infinex is a passkey-first, self-custody crypto superapp with gas abstraction across 20+ chains. It combines a unified portfolio, cross-chain swaps, perpetual futures (including integrations powered by Hyperliquid), prediction markets, NFT trading, and other DeFi features in one interface, with optional browser extension connectivity for dapps.

0xDdf3A93522D503a43f802BeB4882BfF18D940a.name: Katbot
0xDdf3A93522D503a43f802BeB4882BfF18D940a.description: Katbot is an agentic AI trading intelligence platform for leveraged perpetuals on Hyperliquid: it scans markets, surfaces trade setups, and supports automated execution with risk-aware workflows. It is aimed at traders who want AI-assisted research, recommendations, and order automation tied to Hyperliquid builder flows.

0xe95A5e31904e005066614247D309e00D8AD753.name: MetaMask
0xe95A5e31904e005066614247D309e00D8AD753.description: MetaMask is a self-custody crypto wallet for buying, selling, swapping, and holding digital assets across multiple networks. It is developed as part of the Consensys product family and is widely used to connect to dapps and onchain services, including those compatible with Hyperliquid when accessed through supported interfaces.
